title: leuconymphaea × intermedia
intro: Leuconymphaea × intermedia, also known as the intermediate horsetail or prickly club moss, is a hybrid plant species that is part of the genus Leuconymphaea, belonging to the family Equisetaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of silica and other compounds. Leuconymphaea × intermedia has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting urinary health. Herbal preparations of Leuconymphaea × intermedia can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
